title: EaseonSS - CopperStripper
description: Instantly clean oxidized or waxed copper by right-clicking in the air while holding a copper block in one hand and an axe in the other.
body:
## 🌿 Easeon – CopperStripper **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview **CopperStripper** is a lightweight Fabric mod that enhances copper maintenance in Minecraft. Hold an axe or brush in one hand and a copper block in the other, then right-click to instantly remove oxidation or wax.
Preview ![showcase](https://github.com/EaseonKit/EaseonSS-CopperStripper/blob/main/showcase.webp?raw=true)

## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | --------------------------------- | -------------------- | | /easeon copperstripper | View current status | | /easeon copperstripper | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.copperstripper.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
